Murielle, here is the ranking. Which region is the strongest this year?
The North is our best region by far. It has the highest retention and the lowest turnover.
And the weakest?
The South is the weakest, but it made the most remarkable progress of all.
Good point. Who is your standout manager?
Diana. She is our most outstanding leader, and her track record is unmatched.
So Diana wins the most prestigious award this year?
Yes. She is the foremost example of what our best teams can do.
Diana is our most outstanding manager.
This is the most prestigious award.

Good afternoon. Let me share this year's ranking. The North is our strongest region, with the highest retention and the lowest turnover in the whole company. It is also our most cost-effective site. The South is the weakest region overall, but it made the most remarkable progress of all. Our most outstanding manager this year is Diana; her results are simply unmatched. She leads our flagship program and sets the highest standard. In short, the North is the best model, and Diana is the standout leader. Congratulations to everyone.

Hello everyone. It is my great honour to present the most prestigious award of the year. This award goes to the most outstanding leader in our company. This year, the winner set the highest standard in engagement and delivered the best results of any team. Her department is the leading example of what we can achieve, and her commitment is unmatched. She is one of the most reliable and most respected managers we have. She is, without doubt, our foremost talent. Please join me in congratulating this remarkable leader.
